question: Who leads the party that won Ethiopia's June 2026 parliamentary election?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
The party that won Ethiopia's June 2026 parliamentary election is the **Prosperity Party**, led by Prime Minister **Abiy Ahmed**. The party secured a landslide victory, winning 438 seats and roughly 90% of the parliament, according to results released by Ethiopia's National Election Board on June 21, 2026.

Sources: [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/world/africa/ethiopian-prime-ministers-party-wins-parliamentary-majority-election-results-2026-06-21/), [BBC](https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz750q5e3w3o), [Al Jazeera](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/6/21/ethiopian-prime-ministers-party-eas

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer: Prime Minister **Abiy Ahmed** leads Ethiopia’s **Prosperity Party**, which won the June 2026 parliamentary election. ([Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/world/africa/ethiopian-prime-ministers-party-wins-parliamentary-majority-election-results-2026-06-21/))
